positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a fox family: a sleek mother fox, a playful cub, and a small, curious kit, standing together in a stylized, abstract forest clearing. The style should be modern nature iconography, combining the clean lines of mid-century modern design with the intricate detail of Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock prints. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, featuring the foxes outlined against a gradient background of soft sapphire blue fading to deep indigo at the edges. Use strong black outlines and limited, earthy color palettes (burnt orange, cream, deep emerald green). High contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Artwork must be vector-grade and perfectly legible. --ar 1:1
negative: low quality, blur, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, dirty, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, cartoon, photorealistic, detailed background
